zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Anton Peake II於1504年5月15日出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas Anton Peake I15歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey19歲。他於大約1524年與Lady Katherine Chamberlain在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和12個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年在威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Anton Peake II于1504年5月15日出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Anton Peake I15岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey19岁。他于大约1524年与Lady Katherine Chamberlain在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和12个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年在威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Peak  .

variants.name: Peak
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in different parts of England named in Old English with pēac ‘hill, knoll, peak’, includingPeak (Hill) in Sidmouth (Devon), East and West Peek in Luffincot (Devon), a minor locality in Chiddingly (Sussex) once called Peke (now Peke's House), and the Peak District, an area of rugged hills in northwest Derbyshire and adjacent counties.
English: possibly a nickname from the Middle English word in 1 above, denoting a stout, thick-set man.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Anton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Common European form of   Anthony   (see cognates list), now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Anton Peake II was born on 15 May 1504, in Radnorshire, Wales, his father, Sir Thomas Anton Peake I, was 15 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey, was 19. He married Lady Katherine Chamberlain about 1524, in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 12 daughters. He died in 1552, in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Anton Peake II est né le 15 mai 1504, à Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Sir Thomas Anton Peake I, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Katherine Chamberlain environ 1524, à Presteigne, Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 12 filles. Il est décédé en 1552, à Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint Joh: Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint John Zachary, London, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Anton Peake II am 15. Mai 1504 in Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Anton Peake I 15 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey 19. Er hat um 1524 in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom Lady Katherine Chamberlain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Er starb 1552 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Anton Peake II è nato il il 15 maggio 1504 nel Radnorshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Anton Peake I, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Lady Katherine Chamberlain circa 1524, nel Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 12 figlie. Morì nel 1552, nel Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Anton Peake IIが1504年5月15日にウェールズラドノーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Anton Peake Iは15歳，母Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdreyは19歳であった。約1524年にイギリスウェールズラドノーシュアイアプレステイグンでLady Katherine Chamberlainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアプレステイグンで48歳で死去した。

ko.Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint Joh: 영국 런던 세인트 아 앤드 세인트 애그니스 위스 세인트 존 재커리
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Anton Peake II(이)가 1504년 5월 15일 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Anton Peake I(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1524년 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르 프레스테익니에서 Lady Katherine Chamberlain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 웨일스 라드노르실르 프레스테익니에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Anton Peake II nasceu em 15 de maio de 1504, em Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Thomas Anton Peake I, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Katherine Chamberlain aproximadamente 1524, em Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 12 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1552, em Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, com 48 anos.

ru.Saint Ann and Saint Agnes with Saint Joh: сеинт анн анд сеинт агнесь вит сеинт джон зачэри, Лондон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Anton Peake II родился 15 мая 1504 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Anton Peake I было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Katherine Chamberlain около 1524 г. в местности престиин, радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 12 дочерей. Он умер в 1552 г. в местности престиин, радноршир, Уэльс в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Anton Peake II nació el 15 de mayo de 1504, en Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Thomas Anton Peake I, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Jane Cowdrey, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Lady Katherine Chamberlain aproximadamente 1524, en Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió en 1552, en Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, a la edad de 48 años.
